---
title: "mock_file_94.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tmp_load_test/mock_file_94.ts"
loc: 2
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.52
style_score: 9.05
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 9.42
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `data_94`
- `data_94`
- `process_94`
- `process_94`
